title: Resourcesideloader
description: A Mod that helps you dowload multiple mods/resourcepacks within the client.
body:
# ResourceSideloader - Automatic Mod & Resource Pack Downloader

## Description
ResourceSideloader is a client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 that automatically downloads and installs mods and resource packs from configured URLs.
Perfect for server administrators, modpack creators, and players who want to make it easier for friends to access their favorite mods and resource packs without worrying about technical details.

## Features
- **Automatic Downloads:** Downloads mods and resource packs from configured URLs and installs them automatically
- **Multiple Formats:** Supports .zip, .jar, and other file formats
- **Intuitive Configuration:** Easy-to-use in-game configuration with F8 key (customizable)
- **Hash Check:** Only redownloads resources when they've changed
- **Configurable Cooldown:** Adjustable wait time between update checks
- **Auto-start:** Automatically checks for new or updated resources when you start the game

## Usage
1. Install Fabric and Fabric API for Minecraft 1.21.1
2. Install the ResourceSideloader mod
3. Press F8 in-game to open the configuration menu
4. Add URLs to mods or resource packs you want to automatically download
5. Select the appropriate type (MOD or RESOURCE_PACK) for each URL
6. Save and enjoy your automatically downloaded resources!

## For Server Admins
Provide a link to a ZIP file containing all the mods players need for your server. Players with ResourceSideloader will automatically download and install them, making joining your server hassle-free!

## Notes
- URLs should link directly to downloadable files
- The mod performs SHA-256 hash checking to determine if resources need to be redownloaded
- Configure the cooldown setting to control how frequently the mod checks for updates
- 
## Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21.1
- Fabric Loader 0.14.0+
- Fabric API

## Support & Updates
Dm @.t4bzzz on Discord for help and request for updates :)
